L1.area: ELF binary format parsing and core dump note processing

L2.description: A null pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the ELF core dump parsing logic. When processing file entries from a crafted ELF binary, a resolved path value is used directly without verifying it is non-empty, leading to a segmentation fault.

L3.area: ELF core dump note details parsing and core file entry processing
L3.description: A null pointer dereference vulnerability exists when parsing core file note entries in an ELF binary. The code iterates over file path entries from the core notes and uses a resolved path value without checking whether it is empty, causing a segmentation fault when processing a crafted ELF binary containing empty or missing path entries.

ground_truth.reason: In the ELF core dump parser, the file path resolved from note entries is assigned directly without checking for emptiness, causing a segmentation violation (null pointer dereference) when processing a crafted ELF binary with empty path entries.
